item.description: ### Fixed - **The fleet Live Activity now starts on your iPhone by itself.** When an agent needs you — phone in your pocket, app closed — the live fleet card appears on the Lock Screen and in the Dynamic Island on its own. (The start request didn't meet Apple's requirements, so iPhones quietly ignored it.) Pair with the latest companion app from TestFlight for the full experience. - **Live Activity updates no longer count against Apple's push budget**, so a busy fleet can't get your lock-screen updates throttled.
